entry.title: Re: Error when using Background Processing Framework in S...
entry.content:
@JiriNovak2 

When you are working with RAP, the set_operation method should be used instead of the set_operation_tx_uncontrolled method. Additionally, make sure to trigger BGPF in the save_modified method.

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-concepts/scenario-transcational-controlled

entry.title: Re: Delivery date calculation with Custom Calendar in Sal...
entry.content: Already you have some custom calendar in sale order and wondering why, again you are looking for user exit to overwrite that.  If that custom calendar is not required, make it blank.

entry.title: Migration of Remaining Budget
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need to migrate remaining budget for around 500 projects from excel sheet . All these project budget are on ECC system & need to migrate to S4 Hana private edition . We can not connect these 2 system ( ECC to S4 hana ) and subsequently need to download all these details from ECC & upload to new system ( S4 Hana ) . If we need to develop any custom program , can anyone please suggest any API /BAPI etc .

Thanking you very much for your support as usual . 

Best Regards

Mohammed

entry.title: Re: Error message when I use in enable now the function “...
entry.content:
Hwllow

answer to Kart12

The authorisations for the user of the interface between Cloud ALm and Enable Now must be correct. When testing the API, we realised that not everything was set correctly.

entry.title: SAP EWM RFUI Outbound Picking Screen Warehouse Order Validation Issue.
entry.content:
The t-code /SCEM/RFUI is being used for Outbound-Picking.

This screen having many validations based on Warehouse Order & Handling Unit. But there is no any validation for warehouse number, if we are putting wrong Warehouse Number (Like HU number in WO field) the program going to an error/dump.

I have checked the screen, it seems the field is having conversion routine APLH0 (CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPH0_INPUT), Which is calling just after hitting enter after giving wrong WO. The conversion routine not able to convert the wrong data and throwing dump.

This is happening because both the Bar Codes (WO & HU) are placed close to each other. The end-user often doing this mistake to scan wrong bar code.

I tried to put validation on screen level properties but did not find anything relevant. I also tried to write a code PAI but the above routine calling before the any other code and throwing dump.

Can anyone assist me to put a validation for wrong warehouse number and system will throw an error message.

below message queue that is being sent from EWM to ECC after inbound reception. HU data are not included in this message: 

EWM HUs related to inbound: 

ECC Inbound after reception in EWM:

Please note that this is case of communication between Decentralized EWM and SAP ECC.

entry.title: Renewed Server Certificate - SQLA Client fails with "The TLS handshake failed, error code 0x2000051d
entry.content:
We have an instance of SQLA running version 17.0.11.7821 which has been making HTTPS calls for a few years now without issue then today, one endpoint we connect to renewed it's certificate and ever since then we have been getting TLS errors. 

We use a generic function to call the webservice

CREATE PROCEDURE "DBA"."postHttp"( in "endPoint" long varchar,in "version" long varchar,in "type" long varchar,in "headers" long varchar,in "postData" long varchar ) 
url '!endPoint'
set 'HTTP(EXCEPTIONS=off; !version)'
type '!type' header '!headers'

Which we call from different procedures passing the url etc as parameters.

We DON'T define a certificate and, on Windows at least, has always meant that the OS Cert Store is used to validate certificates. 

Connecting using postman on the same server works fine, again using the OS Store, with no certificate errors so I know the OS Store is validating servers certificate. 

I have rebooted the server in hope it might force SQL to refresh it's connection with the OS's Cert Store, but it didn't help.

How can I force SQLA to refresh it's view of the OS certificate store when validating?

entry.title: Re: Batch Job does not trigger replication to C4C
entry.content: @mracantonius1 Unfortunately not, however its a very simple method to call. Please check the method parameters

entry.title: Re: IBP Interface table /IBP/MARC_EXT upload logic
entry.content:
Hi Sam,
This is the documentation of Material Master Data integration: Materials | SAP Help Portal

You can fill MARA_EXT and MARC_EXT in two ways:
- using: transaction /IBP/ECC_INT_MAT
- using BTE, which is automatically collecting and transform changed and newly-created materials online whenever the master data is updated in SAP ERP. This is done using a business transaction event (BTE). Docu for BTE configuration: Setting Up the System Infrastructure | SAP Help Portal

You have a possibility to modify the data with BAdI, custom code: Using Business Add-In Implementations > 
/IBP/ECC_SAVE_MATERIAL

I hope above information helped in better understanding.
Br,Melinda

entry.title: Extend Auto Logout time for ecplise ADT with SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

we are facing in our development enviroment by using ADT with ecplise that - developer get auto logout after 5 mins of inactivity. 

Is there any way to change this? (We wrote SAP already on this but they mentioned that it's set automatically to 30min for ABAP session time out, so that ADT has to relogon.)

However this is somehow not the case for us, wondering if there are other settings which might impact this behavior?
Many thanks for your help!

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics Canvas Reporting
entry.content:
I have a Canvas report that shows all employees who have booked time off (any time type) for May 1st, however, I would prefer to have it show all employees who have not booked time off on that date. Anything I try will only show employees who have booked time off for a time that's not May 1st. 

Is there a way to get it to not show users who have booked time off on that date, but show every other user

SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics

entry.title: Re: Extend Auto Logout time for ecplise ADT with SAP Public Cloud
entry.content: The 5-minute auto-logout issue in ADT/Eclipse, despite SAP's 30-minute ABAP session timeout, likely stems from Eclipse/ADT-specific workspace or project settings, aggressive network (firewall/proxy/load balancer) timeouts, restrictive OS settings, or SAP system configurations beyond the ABAP timeout (like ICM or Gateway parameters). Troubleshooting involves isolating the issue, monitoring network traffic, simplified testing, and comparing configurations with working environments, requiring collaboration with SAP Basis and network teams to identify the overriding setting.

entry.title: SAP PS Public Cloud Project Budget
entry.content:
Hello Dear Colleagues,

My name is Gizem Kaya, and I am a PS Consultant.
I am currently working on a project where we are using the Public Cloud, and budgeting is required for our projects.

I created a project using the Project Control – Enterprise Projects app. The project ID is 25.TEST.02, and the second-level WBS element is 25.TEST.021.

After creating and approving the project, I go to the “Import Financial Plan Data” app, where predefined templates are available. I download the Project Budget template and fill it out as shown in the attached file.

Once I upload the data, the system confirms a successful upload. Then, when I check in the “Display Financial Plan Data” app, the data appears correctly — as shown in the attached screenshot.

However, this data does not reflect in the “Project Budget Report” app.

Could you please advise what steps I should take to resolve this?

Thank you very much for your support.

Best regards,

Gizem Kaya

entry.title: Re: Standalone As-Built Configuration in SAP ME - Excess...
entry.content: Hi! I guess you will not be able to use Plugin-related services. Looks as if RemoveComponentServiceWSService is the only service for you. So you need to play with its methods. It should work with the data returned by RetrieveComponentsServiceWSService. So, if if those 2 services are not sufficient to resolve your task, then it might be an error in the Remove method or a missing API - then you can submit a support ticket..

entry.title: Re: Low-cost,Mdm cost & High Cost in App - Purchase Requi...
entry.content:
Hello Dipak,

enclosed you will find a short summary of the fields.

 

  1. low-cost

Meaning: The Low-cost field indicates that the costs of the respective purchase requisition process are classified as low. This often refers to the value of the purchase requisition or the amount of work required to process it.

Usage: You would use this field to identify requisitions that are low cost or low effort. It could help to process less critical requisitions faster, making the whole process more efficient.

 

  1. mdm-cost (master data management cost)

Meaning: The Mdm-cost field shows the costs incurred by master data management. These are the costs incurred for the maintenance and management of master data (such as supplier and article master data) used in the purchase requisition process.

Usage: This field is used to analyze how much costs are incurred under management of master data. These can be caused by the creation, maintenance, updating and cleansing of data. If these costs are high, this could indicate inefficient master data management processes that could be optimized.

 

  1. high-cost

Meaning: The High-cost field indicates that the costs of the purchase requisition process are classified as high. This can be caused by high values of the purchase requisition or by more complex processes that require more time and effort.

Usage: This field is useful for identifying requisitions that require special attention due to their high cost or effort. These may be expensive items or purchase requisitions with more complicated approval processes. A detailed analysis of these requisitions can help improve efficiency or identify expensive processes that should be optimized.

 

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Migration cockpit - different approach shown for same...
entry.content:
I get the same error when not using my S-User account but another one...here the stepts but the main thing is the update:

Resolution

  1. Implement SAP Note 3452059 - Incorrect Migration Approach for Project in Different Client, SAP S/4HANA Migration Object Modeler in your system.
  2. After implementation, open the migration project in target client and use the option from menu bar (Goto -> Use Project in Different Client).

entry.title: Workflow rules in SAP Cloud for Customer
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement . In the Workcenter Ticket, when the status of a Ticket is , suppose 'XXX' , then we need to send the Reminder Emails to the customer. And this email should be send once per week . So i have created a scheduled workflow rule and here according to an event selected, we can set the time offset and decide when to send the Email. But i cant see an option to send the Emails once per week ( For example, if i need to send these reminders once per every week for 3 months ) . So are there any other ways to send a reminder  email to the customer once per every week depending on the status of the ticket? Please let me know if you have any other suggestions.

entry.title: Re: STO in Sourcing and Procurement
entry.content:
Hello,

See the attached summary on the subject of intra and inter company, as well as the corresponding Fiori apps. As I don't know how you currently work or what exactly you want to do, I have only described this superficially.

  1.  intra-company STO (within the same country or company)

- Domestic: No VAT on transfers within the same company. No tax is due as long as the transfer remains within the same legal entity.

- Cross-border: For cross-border transfers within the same company, import VAT and customs duties must be taken into account. The receiving plant pays import VAT and customs duties must be processed via SAP GTS.

  1.  inter-company STO (between different legal entities)

- Domestic: For transfers between different legal entities within the same country, VAT is charged as it is a sales. The sending company charges VAT, the receiving company deducts input VAT.

- Cross-border: For international inter-company transfers, export duties and import VAT must be taken into account. Customs clearance is carried out via SAP GTS and VAT is calculated according to local tax laws.

Important points:

- Transfer prices must be configured correctly for inter-company transactions.

- Customs duties, import VAT and tax regulations must be observed for cross-border transfers.

 

How to proceed:

- Check and adjust material master and tax code.

- Configure tax key and account determination for taxes.

- Set up transfer prices for inter-company transactions.

- Set up customs clearance for cross-border transfers.

- Check purchase orders and goods receipts and tax calculation.

- Use tax reports and VAT returns to check tax calculations.

Summary of the relevant Fiori apps:

- Manage Material Master - Manage material master data and tax codes.

- Manage Tax Codes - Manage tax codes and tax keys.

- Create Stock Transport Order and Monitor Stock Transport Orders - Create and monitor STOs.

- Post Goods Receipt - Post goods receipt and check tax calculations.

- Monitor Customs Declaration and Create Export Declarations - Customs clearance for cross-border transfers.

- Configure Intercompany Billing and Manage Billing Documents - Transfer pricing management for inter-company transactions.

- Display Tax Returns and Display Sales Tax Reports - View tax returns and VAT reports.

 

Best regards 

Dennis

entry.title: Fiori app to get a supplier confirmation and to create a ASN
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to get an online supplier confirmation without using an EDI or a supplier collaboration tool. Is there a standard fiori app that we can share with the supplier where he can see the run time information, for example he should be able to create an ASN or inbound delivery and should be able to see what quantity has been received by the customer etc.

Can anyone suggest if there is a standard Fiori application available? or shall we go for the custom application?

Regards,

entry.content:
Unfortunately, I get the same behavior, but don't know a solution currently.

There seems to be a Github issue:

https://github.com/eclipse-platform/eclipse.platform.swt/issues/1978

entry.title: Re: 'Generate Mappings' or AI-functionality for emission factor mapping still not working in SAP SFM
entry.content:
Hi Edgar,

Thanks for sharing your question. First of all i would recommend creating a ticket as Nico Said. But from my experience, it looks like the system is pulling emission factors from the Ecoinvent database, but the matches aren’t always ideal or straightforward. A few thoughts that might help troubleshoot:

Possible reasons for the issue:
HS code overlap – Your product is linked to HS-850110, but the suggested emission factors are mapped to multiple HS codes (as seen on the right-hand column). That can sometimes cause confusion or make the mapping less accurate.

Medium similarity scores – The suggestions you're seeing have similarity scores around 7.5–7.7, which means the system is finding “close” matches, not exact ones. This could be due to product descriptions not being detailed enough or a gap between how the HS code is defined vs. how Ecoinvent categorizes it.

Unit mismatch – The top suggestion uses “kgCO2e / Each,” which may or may not fit depending on how your product is defined in your system (e.g. per unit vs. per kg). That can also impact the mapping accuracy.

Suggestions:
Double-check that the HS code is correct and aligned with the intended category. Sometimes even small differences (like HS-850110 vs. HS-850120) can affect results.

If the AI mapping doesn’t return a good result, try manually selecting the emission factor from the suggestions—it might still give you a solid estimate.

Ensure that your product data (name, description, etc.) is clear and specific—more detail can improve the matching logic.

Hope this helps a bit! Best regards,

entry.title: Re: IRPA Set Element value in UI5 is not saved
entry.content: Hi @rohit_singhal. No, it will be unattended automation. But this keystroke hint was good note. After setting up this element with text I use keystroke (enter). It jumps to new line and after saving changes, note is also posted. Thank you.

entry.title: Question on Asset Acquisition Posting in 01/2025 with Depreciation Start in 12/2024
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I have a question regarding asset accounting, specifically posting an asset acquisition. 

How would I post an acquisition that I only recognise and post in 01/2025 (because 12/2024 is already closed), but I want to run the depreciation in 12/2024? So the period 12 is closed, the financial year 2024 is not yet closed, as it has not yet been audited by the auditor (so post-capitalisation is not possible).

When I try to set the asset value date to December 2024 I get an error message saying that the posting date and asset value date need to be in the same fiscal year. So the only solution I found right now would be to also put the posting date into 2024, but thats mostly not possible, since the period was most likely already closed. 

In the acquisition transaction, I noticed that there’s an option to switch the acquisition year between the current year and the previous year. However, changing this setting doesn’t seem to have any visible effect unless it’s used for credit memos or revaluations (as mentioned in some scope items).

So to sum my questions up:

  • What is the correct and compliant way to post an acquisition like this (identified in 01/2025, but depreciation should start in 12/2024)?

  • How does the system technically handle the combination of journal entry date, posting date, and asset value date when periods are closed?

  • Is it sufficient to rely on the postingdate and asset value date setting alone, or are there other best practices or configuration points to consider to ensure correct depreciation calculation?

I’d really appreciate any clarification or experience you can share — thanks in advance!

Kind regards, 
Merle

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Cloud, data lake Casting issue after projection.
entry.content: We would need to see the table definitions as a starting point. The query showing in the error message doesn't do any data type conversions directly, so it isn't sufficient to show what is generating the error. It is quite likely a mismatch in the date/time datatypes being used. HANA and HDLRE have an overlapping set of date/time data types that are compatible, but for historic reasons HDLRE has additional date/time data types that HANA does not.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Services - SAML 2.0 Automatic Certificate Renewal [metadata URL is must]
entry.content:
Hi @yogananda 

The SF certificate will expire in a couple of months to all customers (https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/setting-up-sap-successfactors-with-identity-authentication-and-identity-provisioning-services/migration-to-sap-cloud-identity-services-identity-authentication-service)

The documentation states "For customers/tenants using Identity Authentication (either as a real IDP or proxy IDP to a 3rd party corporate IDP, Identity Authentication will take care of their certificate update automatically."

Is the procedure you're describing supposed to be used for this scenario? I couldn't get clarity so far on how this is going to be executed and for this scenario I've added manually but in a recent upgrade made this year I've noticed the app is created with a blank metadata URL as part of the automatic process executed from the Upgrade Center in SSFF

Thanks

Diego

entry.title: BTP canary global account deletion
entry.content:
Hello community, I am new to the forum as well as SAP. I want to create a canary BTP global account. However, I made a big mistake. I assumed that a canary account would not have billing issues, so I added all permissions and created a subaccount to experiment with a project. Later, my manager told me it would be best to only add the services I need. Therefore, I decided to delete the account and create a new one, but I have to wait for 14 days and the account is suspended. [https://int.controlcenter.ondemand.com/index.html#/uc2/global_accounts]

I would like to ask if anyone has had a similar experience. Will I still be charged during this 14-day suspended period? I am concerned about the billing issue, so I am hesitant to create a new global account, but I really need to experiment with that project.

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: SAP Joule icon missing in S/4HNA Cloud Public Edition

we set up SAP Joule with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (TDD System).

Does anybody have an idea how to define who can see the Joule icon?

BR Tobi

entry.title: Update primary & secondary email for an user in SuccessFactors EC concurrently using OData API
entry.content:
Hi IDM & SF OData API Gurus,

For an user in SF moved from Onboarding module to EC, their personal email is carried forward and marked as primary email(for example "xxx@xxx.com" in PerEmail entity set as 'isPrimary=true'). Now when IDM generates business email(or example "yyy@yyy.com" ) and tries to set using OData API, I'm getting error "Only one email address can be set as primary"

I understand that, only one email can be set as primary and IDM is able to set business email as secondary. However in such case how do we set business email as primary and personal email as secondary in one request using OData?

Here is IDM request -

Thank you for all for your contributions in the community over the years and I wish you all the best for what comes next 🙂

entry.title: Re: Fiori-Style Analytics Dashboard: 'Invalid Username/Pa...
entry.content: Hi ArunJacob Thank you for your advice on database privileges. We are using SAP B1 internal authentication for the SB1 Hana users. On database level we see users like SYTEM, TECH-USER, B1ADMIN etc. But we do not see our internal users. There are some users like B1_4d4c535F502443230323341_RO B1_4d4c535F502443230323341_RW B1_4d4c535F5024432303233_RW B1_4d4c535F5024432303233_RO but the number of this dbs users is much lower than the number off SB1 system users. We did the permission update via Studio. But It did not solved the problem. Kindly could indicate where I could find the internal users in the DBS or how they are mapped to DBS users. We had this problem before in FP 2305 see https://me.sap.com/notes/3314556. In FP 2305HF1 and FP 2411 this was working. For some reason SAP B1 team has ask to urgently update to 2502 w/o testing. Best Regards, Boris

entry.title: Re: #COE#BUMA Discard function in Import Collection
entry.content:
Hi,

As per the Import Collection: Business Impact and Dependencies section on the SAP Help Portal:

  • If Collection Change A (Version 1) is not imported, all its items will be included in Version 2 during import.

  • If you decide to discard Version 1 and import only Version 2, it will not have any dependency impact on Version 2.

  • Later, if you want to import items from Version 1, you can choose Export > All items. This will include the items that were not yet imported into the test tenant, along with the new version.

For more information, please refer to FAQ KBA 3126032 - Export/import Software Collections in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Frequently Asked Questions - SAP for Me > 37 QA

You can also refer to the detailed blog:
New Features for Key User Extensibility Transport ... - SAP Community

Best Regards,

Pooja

entry.title: Re: SAP Concur - Retrieving Receipt Images via file

I saw this article of yours and I wanted to ask you if it works and is compliant for other Italian clients.

thank you.

entry.title: How to create a data function on posting date with consideration of fabric calendar
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are working using Fiori App "Custom Analytical Query" and want to create a date function on the object Posting Date. We want to have the system select the previous working day.

Meaning if it is 31st of May (Friday) the system should fill in the 30th of May (Thursday) in the posting date.

If it is Monday the 27 of May the system should fill in Friday the 24. of May. 

Depending on the actual fabric calender the variable on posting date should fill in the last working day.

How is that to be done in S/4HANA. We are not using Eclipse. We have only the Fiori Apps in S/4HANA Cloud available.

Could you please help? Thank you

entry.title: allocation number equal to refference number
entry.content:
Hi
requirement from the busines site is to set up copy control parameter to get allocation number (ZUONR) equal to refference number (XBLNR).
Other words, they want in FBL5N have view that allocation numer has the same value ass refference.

could you suggest / help hot to set up, please ? should i use VTFA ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager GIS
entry.content:
After the Mapping of the technical objects int he mapping table. During a sync SSAM backend component MAIF will call the GIS system with the provided spacial ID's to get the Co-ordinates for each relevant object. This will then be sent to the mobile app.

SSAM does not use Icons from GIS. SSAM By default uses its own Icons.
If needed these can be changed in the client branding. But they are not synced with the GIS icons. 

So After syncing you will see the Objects which have Co-ordinates on the SSAM Maps. By default with the OoB SSAM Icons.

entry.title: Import history is showing "imported by user" as SMTM<SID> can we get real user ID via charm?
entry.content:
Import history is showing "imported by user" as SMTM<SID>, can we get real user ID via charm?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Import history is showing "imported by user" as SMTM<...
entry.content:
Hello,

In order to check the user ID that did the import into production, you may follow these steps:

  1. With the transport request number, go to the Solution Manager and search in table /TMWFLOW/TRORD_N. This will give you the task list number .
  2. Go to the ChaRM admin cockpit (transaction CM_ADM_COCKPIT), open the task list , and go to the monitor tab
  3. check the logs for import jobs with the timestamp of the import in the relevant system 
  4. the job logs should have the name of the user who launched the import.

Best regards,

Miguel Ariño

entry.title: Re: Conditionally send a standard event from SAP S/4HANA...
entry.content:
You cannot.

And I think you should not. That's not how Event-driven Architecture should work. You need to work with what the events give you. What I suggest: You need to store the delivery date on BTP and compare yourself when you get a Changed event. To get the data, you can either read the data with an API call or create a derived event which contains any data you need, e.g. the delivery date. There are problems with putting too much data into the event (DPP/GDPR, security) why you want to use an API call, this is scenario and business-driven.

At this point in time we have no technical access to what has changed - generically that is just not available. Maybe, one time in the distant future, we may look at utilizing Change Documents. Alternatively, you could create a local event handler that processes the event and somehow find out if the date has changed (probably through a local persistency), if you really, really need to make sure to only send changed events.

Does SF have any type of triggers / integrations / automation to other vendors if possible?

entry.title: Re: unable to Create multiple templates with different la...
entry.content: nope sap recommended to create sperate template for different lang

entry.title: ROW_NUMBER does gaps via AMDP but no gaps via ABAP SQL, bug in my code?
entry.content:
In ABAP 7.58, I have written an SQL query with ROW_NUMBER( ) OVER( ), in two versions, AMDP and pure ABAP SQL.

If Via AMDP HANA SQL, I obtain gaps in the numbers, but no gaps via ABAP SQL, why is there a difference?

1. Via AMDP/CDS Table Function, called from ABAP via SELECT * FROM zcds WHERE bukrs = '1000' :

return select 
  bkpf.bukrs,
  bkpf.waers,
  ...
  sum( ... ) as wrbtr,
  ...
  cast(' ' as belnr_d) as extbelnr,
  ...
  row_number() over ( ) as idnum,
from acdoca
  inner join ...
where ... // conditions against constants
group by ... // all fields before the sum fields
;

2. Via ABAP SQL:

INSERT zzz FROM ( select 
  ROW_NUMBER( ) OVER( ) AS ROW_NUMBER,
  bkpf~bukrs,
  bkpf~waers,
  ...
  sum( ... ) as wrbtr,
  ...
  cast(' ' as char( 10 ) ) as extbelnr,
  ...
from acdoca
  inner join ...
where bukrs = '1000'
  and ... // conditions against constants
group by ... // all fields before the sum fields
).

Thanks

Sandra

My system: ABAP 7.58

entry.title: Re: Universal Allocation: Difference between Cycle Run Group and Allocation Hierarchy explained (2QL
entry.content:
Hi @Eugen_Simandel ,

 

Thank you for a very helpful blog.   We have a few follow-up questions.  We are currently testing Universal Allocation together with SAP Advanced Financial Closing.  When we try to schedule the Allocation Cycle Groups via program FIN_CO_ALLOC_RUN_AFC,  we are getting error "Unable to determine runtime information. Tried to check this note,  but we don't understand how we can test this upfront before including into AFC tasklist

entry.title: Re: ROW_NUMBER does gaps via AMDP but no gaps via ABAP SQ...
entry.content:
It's normal.

1.
The AMDP query doesn't filter on BUKRS (company code), at this stage ROW_NUMBER is calculated correctly without gap.
But you then filter the lines with the second ABAP SQL query, WHERE bukrs = '1000', it's why there are some gaps in IDNUM, the gaps correspond to the lines filtered out, because ROW_NUMBER has not been executed again.
If you move WHERE bukrs = '1000' to the AMDP query, and ABAP SQL SELECT doesn't contain any WHERE clause, it will work the same as only one query like in the case 2.

2.
There is only one SELECT, containing WHERE bukrs = '1000', so ROW_NUMBER is calculated without gaps.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse ADT Version 2025-03 (4.35.0) crashes *continu...
entry.content: Hi @alvaro_blanco, regarding the error message in ADT: we recommend to open a ServiceNow ticket with the following component: BC-DWB-AIE. Our colleagues can then work on the problem more efficiently and try to find a solution for it. Best regards!

entry.title: Hackathon Tachyonix - Edição Recife
entry.content:
Se você é desenvolvedor ABAP ou consultor funcional com conhecimento em ABAP, temos um desafio especial para você! 🚀

A Tachyonix está promovendo o Hackathon – Edição Recife, uma competição que vai testar suas habilidades em um ambiente inovador e competitivo.

💡 Como funciona?


✅ Masterclass de abertura: 28/04 (Online)
✅ Período de desenvolvimento: 30/04 a 08/05 (Online)
✅ Apresentação final: 09/05 (Presencial em Recife, na Accenture – Marco Zero)
✅ Premiação: 10/05, no SAP Inside Track Recife

🏆 E os prêmios?
🥇 1º lugar: PlayStation 5
🥈 2º lugar: Smartphone
🥉 3º lugar: Tablet

📌 Importante: Para participar, é necessário estar em Recife no dia 9 de maio para apresentar seu projeto.

🔗 Garanta sua vaga agora: https://materiais.tachyonix.io/lp-hackathon-tachyonix-edicao-recife

entry.title: Re: allocation number equal to refference number
entry.content:
Hello @lukkurylo ,

it depends on what the source document is for your billing document. If the source document is a sales order/contract, then VTFA is the correct transaction. On the header level of copy control, you can define determination rules for XBLNR and ZUONR fields:

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI Now Available
entry.content:
Good day,

Since SAP provides out-of-box trusted SAP Cloud CA signed user certificates for this solution, does anyone know if SAP can provide a trusted certificate to be used in on-premise SNC communications too? We would like to avoid creating a private CA and distributing it to thousands of users. The SAP CA signed certificate would be used in place for the SNC SAPCryptolib PSE with the user pattern as used in this solution e.g. CN=, L=xxx.accounts.ondemand.com, OU=xxx-secure-login-service, OU=SAP BTP Clients, O=SAP SE, C=DE ...and signed by SAP. Essentially I would create the SNC PSE with the solution user pattern and CN of server, create a CSR and send it to SAP SE Cloud CA to be signed.

Does SAP offer this?

entry.title: AUC partial capitalization not completely using prior year acquisition first
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues, 

We are partially capitalizing assets on ECC 6.0 and auditors have requested an explanation as to why SAP splits the capitalization into current and prior year "streams" with transaction types 331, 336 (asset shell) 338 and 339 (AUC asset). In particular, why the system does not use all of the prior year acquisition values first, before using the current year acquisitions, even if the prior year acquisitions are sufficient to cover the total capitalization value. 

The image below shows the AUC acquisitions in 22/23 of 4,511,271.95.

In 23/24, further acquisitions of 2,313,975.22 was settled to the AUC asset.

When a partial capitalization of 3,453,275.80 was done in 23/24, the value was split into 1,170,770 current year acquisition and 2,282,505.80 prior year acquisition.

Instead of decreasing the prior year (22/23) acquisition value of 4,511,271.95 down to 1,057,996.15. 

From what I can determine, SAP used the total acquisitions for current and prior year: 6,825,247.17 and calculated the % of prior and current acquisitions to the acquisition total. And then applied this percentage during the capitalization process. 66% to 34%. 

Is it SAP standard or best business practice to calculate this split in such a manner? Or is this a configurable calculation. If so, which table or transaction code can be used to view, amend and/or substantiate this calculation?

The assistance would be much appreciated. 

Kind Regards,

Vaughan

AUC transaction detail

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - Message Mapping - addContextChange in UDF is ignored
entry.content: There are ways to accomplish this without a UDF at all with adding additional occurrences and mapping 1 -> 1st index, 2 -> 2nd index, and so on.

entry.title: Re: How to send HU data after reception of inbound delive...

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP - ABAP Runtime Error 'BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT
entry.content: I am encountering the error 'Statement "COMMIT WORK" is not allowed with this status' when calling a method inside a class within an action in an SAP RAP-based development. The method contains a BAPI call, and the error occurs when executing the statement cl_exchange_rates=>put. How can I resolve this issue, considering that COMMIT WORK is being triggered within the BAPI call?

entry.title: Custom UIBB Not Visible in sap mdg fpm
entry.content:
HI Experts,

I have an issue as below and request to guide me on the same. Thanks.

I have a custom uibb in mdg for Customer where OVP is mapped with personalization.

When we create a customer, custom uibb is not visible in screen but when we do a 'reset to default' then the custom uibb is visible.

I close the window completely, then i create a new customer...again the custom uibb is not available.

Can i know the start place where all the uibb begins in terms of some standard class/methods.

On top it, do i need to do any additional settings in system for personalization. Thanks.

 

 

Regards,

KArthik S

entry.title: Re: SAP South California Community is LIVE!!!
